title: South Africa Individual Income Tax Return (ITR12), 2026 year of assessment
description: File a South African individual income tax return (ITR12) for the 2026 year of assessment (1 March 2025 to 28 February 2026) via SARS eFiling, the SARS MobiApp, or a telephonic SARS eBooking appointment. The ITR12 is a dynamically customised return: a taxpayer first answers a set of 'Form Wizard' Yes/No questions, and SARS generates only the return sections those answers require. This document models the taxpayer-information intake (identity, marital status, contact and address details, tax practitioner details), the 'Standard Questions on Form Wizard' (SARS's own term for the common-case customisation questions: employment status, IRP5/IT3(a) employment income, medical expenditure, retirement annuity contributions, travel/vehicle-fringe-benefit deductions, investment/trust/tax-free-investment income, rental income, partnerships, director/close-corporation membership, the Voluntary Disclosure Programme, high-value assets, s18A donations, and other income/expenses), the bank account details section, and the declaration and signature. It deliberately does not model the 'Comprehensive Questions on Form Wizard' (non-resident sourced income, foreign income, capital gains, local farming, and the many downstream income/deduction schedules those wizard answers dynamically add, e.g. rental-income or partnership detail grids) — SARS's own guide draws this same standard/comprehensive boundary, and the downstream sections are themselves repeating, per-item detail grids (e.g. up to 20 rental activities or 20 trusts) that spec v0.3's flat field model cannot represent (see SPEC.md Section 12). It does not submit the return; the live SARS eFiling/MobiApp source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

source.documentRef: IT-AE-36-G05 (Comprehensive Guide to the ITR12 Income Tax Return for Individuals), Revision 40, effective 29 June 2026

verification.notes: GOV-1201 'GovSchema Standard Research' research cycle: per GOV-1194's closing note, South Africa (opened across GOV-1174/1181/1187/1190/1194) had a DMV, Passport, Business Formation, and National ID schema published but no Taxes or Visa candidate, and that closing note specifically flagged SARS eFiling ITR12 as sourceable but not yet pursued. Opens the Taxes vertical for ZA (fifth of six focus verticals). Authored from SARS's own current 'Comprehensive Guide to the ITR12 Income Tax Return for Individuals' (IT-AE-36-G05, Revision 40, effective 29 June 2026 — retrieved directly from sars.gov.za, a genuine text-layer PDF extracted with pdfjs-dist), which is written for the 2026 year of assessment (due dates confirmed on p.7: 23 October 2026 for non-provisional taxpayers, 22 January 2027 for provisional taxpayers filing via eFiling) and documents both the Form Wizard customisation questions (Section 4) and the Taxpayer Information/Declaration/Bank Account Details sections of the return itself (Section 5). Cross-checked field names for the taxpayer-information block (surname, first name, other name, initials, ID/passport, marital status, spouse details, contact details, address) against an older archived static specimen of the return, a Provincial Treasury-hosted copy of the 2017 'LookFeel' ITR12 mock-up PDF (treasury.gov.za), which shows the same field set and character-length constraints (e.g. 13-digit ID number, 10-digit tax reference number) still described qualitatively (not by exact length) in the current guide; used only to corroborate field presence and rough sizing, not as the source of record for current-year content, since it predates the current guide by 9 years. The 10-digit tax-reference-number leading-digit convention (0, 1, 2, 3, or 9) is sourced from third-party tax-preparation guidance (TaxTim), since the SARS guide itself does not state the leading-digit rule explicitly; flagged in VERIFICATION.md as needing a first-party SARS confirmation. Not authored against the v0.3 edition axis: `edition.scheme` is a closed enum of `us-tax-year`/`gb-tax-year`/`award-year` (spec v0.3 SPEC.md Section 5.7, GSP-0005), and extending it to a `za-tax-year` scheme is a one-way-door spec change (GSP-0019, open, Founding Engineer/CEO sign-off) not made unilaterally here — this follows the same non-edition precedent already set by `fr/dgfip/income-tax-return-2042` and `de/finanzamt/income-tax-return-elster`, both of which are also annual individual income tax returns authored at a plain (non-edition) version path. The year of assessment is instead fixed in the title/description/documentRef; a future year's return would ship as a new major version. Deliberately out of scope, per the description: the 'Comprehensive Questions on Form Wizard' section (non-residents, foreign income, capital gains, local farming) and every downstream, per-item repeating income/deduction detail grid the wizard's Yes answers dynamically add (rental-income, partnership, trust, farming, and business/trade schedules) — spec v0.3 has no repeating/nested field model (SPEC.md Section 12), the same limitation the `us/irs/individual-income-tax-return-1040` VERIFICATION.md records for the Form 1040 dependents grid. A mock conformance/za/sars/individual-income-tax-return-itr12/1.0.0/application-packet.json test run (a married-in-community-of-property PAYE employee with medical and retirement-annuity contributions, filing via eFiling with her own SARS-registered bank account), independently checked with a from-scratch GSP-0013 condition evaluator, passed with 0 violations across 78 fields (50 collected, 28 correctly not-applicable) and 10 documents (7 required/applicable, 3 correctly not-applicable); confirmed the spouse-details, IRP5-certificate-count, medical/retirement-annuity-certificate, and bank-detail-change document requiredWhen gates fire correctly, and that the tax-practitioner and non-resident/comprehensive-wizard fields correctly stay out of scope. A mutation test (flipping claimSection18ADonations to true without adding the now-required numberOfPboDonationsRecipients) confirmed the evaluator correctly flags the newly-required field as a violation. Status remains 'draft' pending a live eFiling walkthrough (registration requires a South African tax reference number and OTP-verified contact details, which could not be exercised this cycle) — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: incomeTaxReferenceNumber
fields.label: Income tax reference number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The taxpayer's 10-digit SARS income tax reference number, conventionally starting with 0, 1, 2, 3, or 9 (e.g. 0123456789). Pre-populated on the return and cannot be amended through it.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Income tax reference number' (cannot be amended)

fields.name: isTaxPractitionerDeclaration
fields.label: Completing this return as a registered tax practitioner
fields.description: Mark true if a registered tax practitioner is completing and submitting the return on the taxpayer's behalf. Determines whether the return carries a Taxpayer Declaration (false) or a Tax Practitioner Declaration (true) for signature, and whether the Tax Practitioner Details fields must be completed.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.1 'PERSON MAKING THE DECLARATION' — 'Mark with an "X" if you are completing the return as a tax practitioner'

fields.name: identificationType
fields.label: Identification type
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer is identified by South African ID number or by passport. Pre-populated from SARS registration records and cannot be amended through the return itself; changes require contacting SARS.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Identity number' / 'Passport number' (cannot be updated via the return)

fields.name: idNumber
fields.label: Identity number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The taxpayer's 13-digit South African ID number.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Identity number'

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passport number
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Passport number'

fields.name: passportCountry
fields.label: Passport country of issue
fields.description: Three-letter country code of the passport's issuing country, e.g. ZAF for South Africa.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Passport Country'

fields.name: passportIssueDate
fields.label: Passport issue date
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Passport Issue Date'

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Mandatory and editable through the return.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Surname': mandatory field

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'First name': mandatory field

fields.name: otherName
fields.label: Other name
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Other name': optional field

fields.name: initials
fields.label: Initials
fields.description: The taxpayer's full initials.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Initials': mandatory field, 'Indicate your full initials'

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Pre-populated from SARS registration records; cannot be amended through the return.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Date of birth' (cannot be updated via the return)

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.description: The taxpayer's marital status as at 28 February (the last day of the year of assessment). Mandatory: it may affect the assessment where the taxpayer received investment or rental income, or entered into capital gain transactions.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — 'Marital status': mandatory field

fields.name: spouseInitials
fields.label: Spouse's initials
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(c) — 'Spouse details': mandatory if married in community of property

fields.name: spouseIdNumber
fields.label: Spouse's identity number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required if the spouse has a South African ID number; use spousePassportNumber/spousePassportCountry instead for a foreign spouse.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(c) — 'Spouse details': mandatory if married in community of property

fields.name: spousePassportNumber
fields.label: Spouse's passport number
fields.description: For a foreign spouse without a South African ID number.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(c) — 'Spouse details'

fields.name: spousePassportCountry
fields.label: Spouse's passport country of issue
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(c) — 'Spouse details'

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Encouraged (supports SARS's 'Go-Green' initiative and enables the notice of assessment to be emailed), not mandatory.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Email'

fields.name: noEmailAddressDeclared
fields.label: I declare that I do not have an email address
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Mark here with an "X" if you declare that you do not have an email address'

fields.name: cellphoneNumber
fields.label: Cell number
fields.description: Encouraged (SARS sends the assessment result by SMS), not mandatory.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Cell Number'

fields.name: noCellphoneNumberDeclared
fields.label: I declare that I do not have a cellphone number
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Mark here with an "X" if you declare that you do not have a cell phone number'

fields.name: homeTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Home telephone number
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Home Telephone Number'

fields.name: businessTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Business telephone number
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Business Telephone Number'

fields.name: contactDetailsConfirmedCorrect
fields.label: Do you confirm that the email and telephone number(s) supplied are correct?
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Do you confirm that the email and telephone number(s) supplied are correct?' (Select Y or N)

fields.name: residentialAddressSameAsPostal
fields.label: Residential address is the same as postal address
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details': 'mark the applicable box indicating that the addresses are the same'

fields.name: postalAddressLine1
fields.label: Postal address
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: postalSuburb
fields.label: Suburb (postal address)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: postalCityTown
fields.label: City/town (postal address)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: postalCode
fields.label: Postal code (postal address)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: residentialAddressLine1
fields.label: Residential address
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: residentialSuburb
fields.label: Suburb (residential address)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: residentialCityTown
fields.label: City/town (residential address)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: residentialPostalCode
fields.label: Postal code (residential address)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(d) — 'Address Details'

fields.name: taxPractitionerRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner registration number
fields.description: The first two characters must be 'PR' followed by 7 alphanumeric characters.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(e) — 'Tax Practitioner Registration No.'

fields.name: taxPractitionerTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner telephone number
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(e) — 'Tax Practitioner Telephone No.'

fields.name: taxPractitionerEmailAddress
fields.label: Tax practitioner email address
fields.description: If the tax practitioner has no email address, mark the corresponding 'no email address' declaration on the return instead (not separately modeled here).
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(e) — 'Tax Practitioner Email Address'

fields.name: isRsaTaxResidentFullYear
fields.label: I was a South African tax resident for the full year of assessment
fields.description: This schema models the resident 'Standard Questions on Form Wizard' only. A taxpayer who is a foreign national and not an RSA tax resident, who ceased or reinstated RSA tax residency during the year, or who otherwise uses the 'Form Wizard for Non-Resident' (Comprehensive Guide §4.1.2-4.1.3, §4.3) is out of scope for this document.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.2 'RESIDENCY' / §4.1.3 'NON-RESIDENTS'

fields.name: wasUnemployedFullYear
fields.label: I was unemployed for the full year of assessment and did not receive any income
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.4(b) — 'Mark with an X if you were unemployed for the full year of assessment'

fields.name: madeRetirementAnnuityContributionsWhileUnemployed
fields.label: Made retirement annuity fund contributions while unemployed for the full year
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.4(c) — 'Did you make any retirement annuity fund contributions?'

fields.name: wasUnemployedForPartOfYear
fields.label: I was unemployed for one or more periods during this year of assessment
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.4(d) — 'Were you unemployed for any period during this year of assessment?'

fields.name: numberOfUnemploymentPeriods
fields.label: Number of unemployment periods
fields.description: Each continuous period of unemployment during the year of assessment counts as one period. Maximum of 5.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.4(d) — 'For how many periods were you unemployed?' (maximum value of 5)

fields.name: receivedIrp5Income
fields.label: I received income reflected on an IRP5/IT3(a) certificate
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(a) — 'Indicate if you received income reflected on an IRP5/IT3(a) certificate'

fields.name: numberOfIrp5Certificates
fields.label: Number of IRP5/IT3(a) certificates received
fields.description: The return caters for a maximum of 15 IRP5/IT3(a) certificates captured this way.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(b) — 'How many certificates did you receive?' (maximum of fifteen)

fields.name: paidMedicalExpensesAsMainMember
fields.label: I (or my employer) paid qualifying medical/disability expenses, including medical scheme contributions where I am the main member
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(c) — 'Mark with an "X" if you or your employer ... paid any qualifying disability and/or medical expenses ... where you are the main member'

fields.name: paidMedicalExpensesForDependentFamily
fields.label: I paid qualifying medical/disability expenses for a family member I am liable to support, who is not the medical scheme's main member
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(c) — 'Mark with an "X" if you paid any qualifying ... medical expenses ... for a family member for whom you are liable for family care and support'

fields.name: madeRetirementAnnuityContributions
fields.label: I (or my employer) contributed to my retirement annuity benefit (excluding pension and provident funds)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(d) — 'Mark with an "X" if you or your employer contributed to your retirement annuity benefit. This must exclude pension and provident funds'

fields.name: contributedToPensionOrProvidentFundNotOnCertificate
fields.label: I made additional pension/provident fund contributions not shown on any employee's tax certificate
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(d) — 'Mark with an "X" if you contributed to pension and/or provident fund for past or additional services not shown on any Employee Income Tax Certificate(s)'

fields.name: claimTravelAllowanceDeduction
fields.label: I want to claim a tax deduction against a travel allowance (kept a logbook)
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(e) — 'Mark with an "X" if you want to claim a tax deduction for your travel allowance (not petrol/diesel allowance) if you kept a logbook'

fields.name: numberOfVehiclesForTravelClaim
fields.label: Number of vehicles used for the travel allowance claim
fields.description: Maximum of 5; contact SARS if more.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(e) — 'Indicate the number of vehicles used during the year of assessment'

fields.name: claimEmployerProvidedVehicleDeduction
fields.label: I want to claim a deduction for a vehicle provided by my employer
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(e) — 'Mark with an "X" if you want to claim a deduction for a vehicle provided by your employer?'

fields.name: numberOfEmployerProvidedVehicles
fields.label: Number of employer-provided vehicles used
fields.description: Maximum of 12.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(e) — 'Insert the number of employer provided vehicles used during the year of assessment' (maximum of 12)

fields.name: receivedForeignServiceRemunerationOnCertificate
fields.label: I received payment/remuneration for work done outside South Africa that is shown on my South African employee's tax certificate(s)
fields.description: The s10(1)(o) foreign-employment-exemption qualifying-criteria sub-questions this answer can trigger are out of scope for this document; a 'true' answer should be treated as a signal that specialist review is needed.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.5(f) — 'Mark with an "X" if you received any form of payment/remuneration for work done outside RSA that is shown on your South African Employee Income Tax Certificate(s)'

fields.name: receivedInterestDividendsOrReit
fields.label: I received local/foreign interest, REIT distributions, taxable local/foreign dividends, or s8E/s8EA deemed dividend income
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.6(a) — 'Did you receive any interest (local and foreign), distributions from a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) ... taxable foreign dividends and/or dividends deemed to be income in terms of s8E & s8EA?'

fields.name: receivedExemptDividendIncome
fields.label: I received exempt local and/or foreign dividend income
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.6(a) — 'indicate "Did you receive exempt local and/or foreign dividend income?"'

fields.name: receivedTrustIncome
fields.label: I received or became entitled to income as a beneficiary of a trust, or income deemed to be mine under s7
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.6(b) — 'Mark with an "X" if you received or became entitled to any income as a beneficiary of a Trust, or income deemed to be yours under s7'

fields.name: numberOfTrusts
fields.label: Number of trusts applicable
fields.description: Maximum of 20.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.6(b) — 'Indicate the number of Trust(s) applicable?' (maximum of 20)

fields.name: hadTaxFreeInvestmentTransactions
fields.label: I had contribution, transfer, withdrawal, or income transactions on a Tax Free Investment this year
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.6(c) — 'Were there any transactions (contributions, transfers, withdrawals, income received/accrued) on any Tax Free Investments held by you during this year of assessment?'

fields.name: numberOfTaxFreeInvestments
fields.label: Number of tax free investments
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.6(c) — 'Indicate the number of tax free investments'

fields.name: derivedRentalIncome
fields.label: I derived income from letting fixed property/properties
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.7(a) — 'Did you derive income from the letting of fixed property(ies) ...?'

fields.name: numberOfRentalProperties
fields.label: Number of separate rental activities
fields.description: Maximum of 20.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.7(a) — 'From how many separate rental properties did you derive income?' (maximum of 20)

fields.name: isPartnerInBusiness
fields.label: I am a partner in one or more businesses
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.8(a) — 'Are you a partner in a business?'

fields.name: numberOfPartnershipBusinesses
fields.label: Number of businesses I am a partner in
fields.description: Maximum of 20.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.8(a) — 'How many businesses are you a partner in?' (maximum 20)

fields.name: isDirectorOrCloseCorporationMember
fields.label: I am a director of a company or a member of a close corporation
fields.description: Selecting this adds a Statement of Local and Foreign Assets and Liabilities section to the return, out of scope for this document.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.9(b) — 'Mark with an "X" if you a director of a company or a member of a close corporation'

fields.name: relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme
fields.label: This return relates to an application made under the SARS Voluntary Disclosure Programme
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.10(a) — 'Mark with an "X" if any declaration in this return relates to an application made under the SARS Voluntary Disclosure Programme'

fields.name: hasAssetsExceedingR50Million
fields.label: I have assets which at market value are in excess of R50 million
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.11(a) — 'Mark with an "X" if you have assets which at market value are in excess of R50 million'

fields.name: claimSection18ADonations
fields.label: I want to claim donations made to an approved Public Benefit Organisation under s18A
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.12(a) — 'Do you want to claim donations made to an approved Public Benefit Organisation in terms of s18A?'

fields.name: numberOfPboDonationsRecipients
fields.label: Number of Public Benefit Organisations donated to
fields.description: Maximum of 99.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.12(a) — 'How many Public Benefit Organisations did you donate to?' (maximum value allowed is 99)

fields.name: hasOtherIncomeOrAllowableExpenses
fields.label: I received other income (e.g. local business/trade/professional income) and/or incurred other allowable expenses not addressed above
fields.description: Also select true if no IRP5/IT3(a) certificate was received but medical expenses and/or retirement annuity contributions must still be claimed. Triggers a more comprehensive set of questions, out of scope for this document.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §4.1.14(b) — 'Mark with an "X" if you received any other income ... and/or incur any other allowable expenses ... not addressed above'

fields.name: bankAccountHolderDeclaration
fields.label: Bank account holder declaration
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Bank Account Holder Declaration'

fields.name: reasonForNoOrThirdPartyBankAccount
fields.label: Reason for no local / third-party bank account
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Reason for No Local / 3rd Party Bank Account'

fields.name: bankAccountNumber
fields.label: Bank account number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Account number'

fields.name: bankName
fields.label: Bank name
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Bank Name' (selected from a drop-down list; 'Other' if not listed)

fields.name: branchNumber
fields.label: Branch number
fields.description: Auto-completed on the return once bankName is selected from the drop-down list, unless 'Other' is selected.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Branch number'

fields.name: accountType
fields.label: Account type
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Account type' (cheque, savings, or transmission)

fields.name: accountHolderName
fields.label: Account holder name
fields.description: As registered at the bank.
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Account holder name'

fields.name: bankDetailsAgreementStatement
fields.label: I declare that the bank account information provided is true and correct in every respect
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.1(b) — 'Agreement Statement': 'Mark the corresponding statement on the return with an "X"'

fields.name: declarationTrueAndCorrect
fields.label: I declare that this return is a full and accurate disclosure of all relevant information
fields.description: Misrepresentation, neglect, or omission may be subject to penalties, additional assessments and interest, or criminal prosecution. The declaration text shown differs depending on whether the taxpayer or a tax practitioner signs (see isTaxPractitionerDeclaration).
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.2(b) — 'you must ensure that you make a full and accurate disclosure of all relevant information required in the income tax return'

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date signed
fields.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.2(e) — 'you must read the declaration on the return and sign accordingly'

documents.label: Valid South African ID document (green bar-coded book or Smart ID Card) or passport
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.1(b) — Identity number/Passport number fields

documents.label: IRP5/IT3(a) Employee's Tax Certificate(s)
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §3.4(a) — 'IRP5/IT3(a) Employees' Tax Certificate for remuneration received or in respect of lump sums'

documents.label: Medical scheme tax certificate and proof of qualifying medical expenses not recovered from the scheme
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §3.4(a) — 'The tax certificate received from your medical scheme ... Proof of qualifying medical expenses paid by you and not recovered from a medical scheme'

documents.label: Income tax certificate(s) from the financial institution for retirement annuity contributions made
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §3.4(a) — 'The income tax certificate(s) received from the financial institution for retirement annuity contributions made'

documents.label: Tax certificate(s) from the financial institution(s) for tax free investments
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §3.4(a) — 'The tax certificate(s) received from the financial institution(s) for tax free investments'

documents.label: Logbook of business travel
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §3.4(a) — 'If you received a travel allowance or a fringe benefit for an employer provided vehicle, you must have a logbook to claim the business travel deductions'

documents.label: Proof of residential address (e.g. a utility account, less than 3 months old, in the taxpayer's name)
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.2 — documentation required for bank detail changes; §5.3.3 — proof of residential address table

documents.label: Original bank statement (or ATM/internet-generated/ABSA eStamped statement), not more than 3 months old, confirming account holder name, bank, account number and type, and branch code
documents.sourceRef: Comprehensive Guide §5.3.2(a) — 'An original bank statement, or ATM/Internet generated statement, or ABSA eStamped statement, not more than three months old'

documents.label: Signature of the taxpayer (or tax practitioner, if applicable), Declaration section
documents.statement: I declare that this return is a full and accurate disclosure of all relevant information required in the income tax return; misrepresentation, neglect, or omission to submit a return or supplying false information may be subject to penalties and/or additional assessments (together with interest) and/or criminal prosecution.
